headline: Cinnaholic Brings Its 85 Franchise Locations Back to Square
summary: ATLANTA, March 05, 2026--Cinnaholic, the plant-based gourmet cinnamon roll franchise, has found the recipe for sweet success by reengaging Square to power its nationwide operations across 85 locations. Cinnaholic grew its business on Square for twelve years, and after a year of trying another solution, the franchise has recommitted to Square's integrated commerce platform – drawn back by its proven reliability and expansive franchise capabilities. headline: Block CFO confirms AI caused mass layoffs: What to know
summary: Block (XYZ) layoffs have impacted 40% of staff. CFO Amrita Ahuja confirmed that the layoffs were due to artificial intelligence (AI). B. Riley Wealth chief market strategist Art Hogan and Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma chat with Opening Bid host Brian Sozzi about the layoffs and AI's impact on the workforce. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Opening Bid.

headline: BofA sees card networks as safest bets, bullish on Visa & Mastercard

headline: Wall Street Sees AI’s ‘Creative Destruction’ Coming For Entire Companies
summary: While most economists say fears of an AI job apocalypse are overblown, seismic shifts have happened in the past after big tech breakthroughs.  The IT revolution of the 1990s led to a surge in productivity that sped up the US economy for several years.  Economists expect artificial intelligence will deliver higher productivity, which is key to raising growth rates in the long run.
